name: webcake-landing-mcp
description: Build, validate, and publish complete Webcake landing pages with an AI assistant.
long_description: Webcake Landing lets your AI assistant design, validate, and publish complete landing pages straight into your Webcake account. Describe the page you want — the assistant assembles the layout, content, and images, checks it against the Webcake page schema, saves it, and publishes a live preview. It can also edit existing pages section-by-section, search stock photos, resolve icons, and import a reference URL or HTML to clone a layout. Reference, generation, media, and ingest tools work with no credentials; the persistence tools save to your own Webcake organization using a JWT you provide.

webcake_jwt.title: Webcake JWT
webcake_jwt.description: Your Webcake landing-page access token. Required only to save/list/publish pages (the reference, generation, media, and ingest tools work without it). Get it by running 'npx webcake-landing-mcp login', or from your Webcake account.

webcake_env.title: Webcake Environment
webcake_env.description: Which Webcake backend to target: prod, staging, or local. Defaults to prod.

webcake_org_id.title: Default Organization ID
webcake_org_id.description: Optional default Webcake organization to create pages in. Leave blank to choose per request.

pexels_api_key.title: Pexels API Key (optional)
pexels_api_key.description: Optional Pexels API key for stock-photo search. Without one, images are fetched via a shared hosted proxy. Free key: https://www.pexels.com/api/

tools.name: get_generation_guide
tools.description: Get the landing-page generation guide and recipes.

tools.name: list_elements
tools.description: List all available element types in the catalog.

tools.name: get_element
tools.description: Get docs and a sparse authoring template for an element type.

tools.name: get_page_schema
tools.description: Get the canonical JSON Schema for a page source.

tools.name: new_element
tools.description: Return a sparse authoring template for an element node.

tools.name: new_page_skeleton
tools.description: Return a starter page-source skeleton.

tools.name: validate_page
tools.description: Validate a page source against the schema and semantic rules.

tools.name: ingest_html
tools.description: Parse HTML into a reference AST for cloning a layout.

tools.name: ingest_url
tools.description: Fetch a URL and parse it into a reference AST.

tools.name: search_images
tools.description: Search stock photos (Pexels) for page imagery.

tools.name: get_icon_svg
tools.description: Resolve Material Symbols / Font Awesome icon names to inline SVG.

tools.name: upload_images
tools.description: Re-host external or local images to the Webcake CDN.

tools.name: list_organizations
tools.description: List the Webcake organizations on your account.

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List landing pages in your Webcake account.

tools.name: find_pages
tools.description: Search your pages by name, domain, or id.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Get the source of an existing Webcake page.

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create and auto-publish a new Webcake page.

tools.name: add_section
tools.description: Append section(s) to an existing Webcake page.

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Overwrite an existing Webcake page source.

tools.name: patch_page
tools.description: Edit a page by element id with per-element ops.

tools.name: publish_page
tools.description: Build and publish a page to refresh its live preview.
